Issue 02 Fri 12 Jun 2026
The Weekly Newsletter

Mid-Year.
Time to Push.

Half the year is behind us. This week’s issue stacks the plays — Chairman flying in for our leaders, commission rates that just doubled, a wealth class your buyers should sit in, a prize pool collecting, and the GTA selector going live. Three departments, multiple wins, one read.

A Note to Agents

None of this stacks if you don’t act. Pick one play this week — and run it.

In This Issue
  1. 01 Marketing →
  2. 02 Sub-sales →
  3. 03 Project →
01
Department

Marketing

— Highlight 01

Mid Year Leader Conference — “Leaders, Are You Ready?”

This is where your TL walks out with the playbook for your team’s next 6 months — and PropNex Malaysia is footing most of the bill.

  • Ismail Gafoor × Marcus Teng on one stage — Chairman (PropNex Singapore) × CEO (PropNex Malaysia); Ismail flies in just for our leaders
  • A mid-year reset — recharge leadership, refocus vision, accelerate team momentum
  • RM300 subsidised by PropNex Malaysia, lunch buffet included — your TL pays less, gets more
  • Fri 10 July 2026 · 9 AM – 6 PM at GEO Resort Genting
  • Team Leader & above only — if that’s not you, forward this to your TL today
Register Now
— Highlight 02

Rising Millionaire (June) — How Ann Ong Went from Agent to Team Leader

From a regular agent to a team leader — the real story, not the highlight reel.

This month’s Rising Millionaire features Ann Ong unpacking how she climbed from rank-and-file to running a team. What she’s bringing to the session:

  • The strategies she adjusted year over year — to grow steadily, not in lucky bursts
  • How she defines her own “value” — and uses it to stand out in a crowded market
  • The 3 daily habits that keep her going strong in real estate

Everything is from real, hands-on experience. Mon 15 June 2026 — your next breakthrough might be in that room.

Watch the Teaser
— Highlight 03

Know What’s Next. Plan What’s Ahead.

A full month of company training in one view — and the best recruiting pitch you’ll send this week.

Bookmark the Training Calendar on the company website and use it two ways: plan your own skill stack so you don’t miss the sessions that matter, and bring it into your next recruitment chat — a transparent training schedule sells your pitch better than you can.

View Training Calendar
— Highlight 04

PropTalk Ep 2 — DSR Decoded with Michael Jau

Forward this to any buyer worried about loan approval — and use it to filter your pipeline.

  • Pre-qualify a buyer in 30 seconds — stop wasting time on viewings that won’t close
  • Speak banker fluently — explain CCRIS like a pro and win client trust on the spot
  • Rescue a “rejected” buyer with the joint-borrower play — close deals others give up on
  • Land high-net-worth clients by knowing when the 90% DSR rule bends
  • Coach a stuck buyer to fix their record in 6 months = a future deal locked in
Watch PropTalk Ep 2
02
Department

Sub-sales

— Highlight 01

Open House Campaign — Every Deal Stacks Your Year-End Share

Since January 2026, every successful transaction linked to an open house contributes to the Open House Prize Pool — the Top 23 performers will share the accumulated pool based on points earned. Don’t miss this: submit your open house listings now to keep collecting points toward the year-end rewards. Official campaign mechanics and prize details will be announced by the Operations Department.

Submit Open House Listing
— Highlight 02

GTA Selection Is Live — Update Yours Today

Now available in Agent Portal — required for every agent.

Your GTA tells the company where you actively serve, so we can connect you with the right opportunities, projects, training, and market updates relevant to your area.

  • Pick your Location AND Specializations (Residential / Commercial / Industrial / Land)
  • Path: Agent Portal → Dashboard → Settings → GTA → Save
  • Location not on the list? Ping WaiYan at 012-620 9954 to add it
Contact WaiYan · 012-620 9954
03
Department

Project

— Highlight 01

Wealth Growth Class with Hao Qian Cheng (China) — First Time in Malaysia

Why do some grow wealthier while others stay in place? It’s not effort — it’s the right method and system.

PropNex Malaysia hosts the gold-medal lecturer team from China’s Hao Qian Cheng (好前程) academy for their first visit to Malaysia — 2 days covering:

  • Foundation of wealth growth
  • Sustained cash-flow systems
  • Property investment & asset allocation
  • Family wealth planning systems
  • Business risk management strategies
  • Building a second income stream

27–28 June 2026 (Sat & Sun) · 9 AM – 9 PM · PropNex Malaysia HQ, Jaya One, PJ.
RM500 promo (was RM1,500) · only 50 seats, first come first served · Enquiries: +60 14 331 8493.

Register · 50 Seats Only
— Highlight 02

SEACRESTZ @ Kuantan by EXSIM — Up to 6.4% Commission, 7-Day Payout

PROPNEXIANS, don’t miss this. EXSIM SEACRESTZ @ Kuantan is paying up to 6.4% commission with 7-day fast commission. The recent briefing attracted a strong crowd of agents — demand is building. Join the official group to stay on top of every update.

Join Official Group
— Highlight 03

SENTRAL SUITES @ KL Sentral — Commission Doubled to 8%

Commission doubled from 4% to 8%, with a new sales package:

  • 25% rebate on SPA price
  • Free SPA legal fee
  • Free loan legal fee
  • Partially furnished

More value for buyers, more earnings for agents. Join the WhatsApp group for the latest pricing and inventory.

Join WhatsApp Group
